text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
43 
MDCD_OT_TOTAL_SPEND 
LABEL: 
Medicaid Payment Amount — Other Services 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of Medicaid payment amount from the other services (OT) (header) claims for 
the beneficiary during the year, after removing the managed care capitated payments. Note that this 
dollar amount may be an undercount if the beneficiary had managed care claims. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Other Services
